'''Eero Iridian''' was a friend of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] during his [[Standard year/Legends|years]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], and he aspired to be a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Though he ran twice for senator, he never managed to gain any political success. Eero eventually betrayed his old [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] friend during a plot with [[Lorian Nod]] to kidnap several senators, including [[Blix Annon]], but Dooku and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], managed to capture the conspirators and return them to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to stand trial.

Eero didn't know it, but he was a pawn in a plot formulated by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], [[Darth Tenebrous/Legends|Darth Tenebrous]], who wished to have him replace Senator Annon.
